dict.string: Nebula Agent needs access to run development tasks in your workspace.
Nebula Agent needs access to read and write project files.
Nebula Agent needs access to read downloaded files for tasks.
Nebula Agent may need to access external drives for builds.
Nebula Agent does not need photo access. Deny this request.
Nebula Agent does not need Music access. Deny this request.
Nebula Agent connects to your Nebula server over the local network.
